subject: [PATCH v6 01/22] mm/swap: decouple swap cache from physical swap infrastructure

2026-05-05.patch_summary: This patch decouples the swap cache from physical swap infrastructure to prepare for virtualizing swap space. The swap cache will be managed at the virtual swap layer, and a single global lock is temporarily used to synchronize swap cache accesses. The swap table infrastructure is repurposed to serve as the rmap (physical -> virtual swap mapping) later. This patch removes swap cache related helpers from the swap table and prepares for future changes in the swap cache management.
